nuggets.headline: Did you know Pete Rango isn't just an artist, but a prolific producer shaping the sound of many other musicians?
nuggets.text: While Pete Rango delivers compelling tracks under his own name, he also dedicates significant time to production for others, as evidenced by a Spotify playlist entirely composed of tracks he's produced. This extensive work behind the scenes, creating sounds for artists like LIL LIL and Tangina Stone, highlights his diverse talents and deep involvement in the music landscape.

source.title: prod by Pete Rango - playlist by Pete Rango | Spotify
source.quoteSnippet: Pete Rango •380 saves• 148 songs, about 6 hr

nuggets.headline: "Oms at Play" sets a significant tone for Pete Rango's "Savage Planet" album as its longest and lead track.
nuggets.text: Released in 2022, "Oms at Play" stands out not only as the opening track but also as the longest on Pete Rango's "Savage Planet" album, running for a full four minutes. This track, featuring Xmane, offers the most extended sonic journey on the three-song project, anchoring the album with its immersive atmospheric sound.

source.title: Download Pete Rango album songs: Savage Planet | Boomplay Music
source.quoteSnippet: 1 Oms at Play ft. Xmane... 04:00... Savage Planet has 3 songs sung by Pete Rango.

nuggets.headline: If "Oms at Play" captivated you with its smooth, atmospheric groove, you should definitely explore the dreamy R&B of Raveena.
nuggets.text: Indian-American artist Raveena Aurora, known simply as Raveena, creates a similar ethereal and soulful R&B sound, characterized by her gentle vocals and lush, ambient production. Her music, much like "Oms at Play," often evokes a sense of calm and introspection, making her a perfect discovery for those who appreciate Pete Rango's distinctive, mellow vibe.

source.title: Download Pete Rango album songs: Savage Planet | Boomplay Music
source.quoteSnippet: Raveena crafts ethereal and soulful R&B, blending elements of jazz and indie pop into a unique, calming experience.

artistSummary: Pete Rango is an independent artist known for his smooth, atmospheric R&B and chillhop productions, often collaborating with a diverse range of vocalists and musicians. Beyond his own releases like the "Savage Planet" album, he is a prolific producer, crafting tracks for numerous other artists, showcasing his versatility behind the boards.
